testcase.name: test_google_mock
test_gsc_connect_get_returns_standard_error
test_gsc_callback_returns_standard_error
test_api_key_test_returns_latency_ms[openai]
test_api_key_test_returns_latency_ms[sendgrid]

test_api_key_test_returns_latency_ms[gemini]

test_api_key_test_returns_latency_ms[dataforseo]
test_api_key_test_returns_latency_ms[lemonsqueezy_api_key]
test_supported_keys_includes_sendgrid

failure.message: AssertionError: Resend should be removed assert 'resend' not in ['openai', 'anthropic', 'gemini', 'perplexity', 'sendgrid', 'resend', ...]

testcase.failure: E AssertionError: Resend should be removed assert 'resend' not in ['openai', 'anthropic', 'gemini', 'perplexity', 'sendgrid', 'resend', ...]
